benchmarks: AgentBench: A Comprehensive Framework to Evaluate LLMs as Agents
GAIA: A Benchmark for General AI Assistants
MINT: Evaluating Multi-agent Interaction in Tool-using Tasks
emerging_patterns: Self-Evolving Evaluation: Agents evaluating each other's reasoning traces.
Visual QA: Using multimodal models to audit UI actions (mirrors our Perception Critic).
Epistemic Gain: Measuring how much an agent reduces uncertainty during a task.

doctrine_alignment.Authorship: Evaluation must track which agent initiated the change.
doctrine_alignment.Ethics: Measuring the delta between user intent and agent action.
